title: Browse annonces listing and open a listing detail page
description: Verifies the home page shows annonce cards and a user can open a listing detail page from a card.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Scroll to the annonce listing grid
Click an annonce card
Verify the annonce detail page is displayed

title: Paginate annonces from page 1 to page 2
description: Verifies pagination controls can load the next page of annonces results.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Scroll to the pagination controls
Click the control to go to page 2
Verify the listing grid shows updated results for page 2

title: Verify listing cards display key summary information
description: Verifies annonce cards in the grid include key summary fields users expect when browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Scroll to the annonce listing grid
Verify listing cards display an image, a title, a price, and a location

title: Paginate to page 2 and open a listing from that page
description: Verifies a cross-step browse journey: paginating then opening a listing still navigates to the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Scroll to the pagination controls
Click the control to go to page 2
Click an annonce card from the updated results
Verify the annonce detail page is displayed

title: Refresh listing results by navigating between pages
description: Verifies the user can move between pages without the UI getting stuck on a single results set.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Scroll to the pagination controls
Click the control to go to page 2
Click the control to go back to page 1
Verify the listing grid shows updated results after returning to page 1

title: Apply full set of search filters to narrow results
description: Verifies the search/filter form can be filled and submitted to update listing results.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Select a type from the type dropdown
Select a category from the category dropdown
Select a subcategory from the subcategory dropdown
Select a wilaya from the wilaya dropdown
Select a moughataa from the moughataa dropdown
Fill a valid keyword into the keyword search field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Submit the search filters
Verify filtered annonce results are displayed in the listing grid

title: Open and close mobile filter modal
description: Verifies the mobile filter modal can be opened and dismissed using normal UI controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Click the control to open the mobile filters modal
Click the control to close the mobile filters modal
Verify the filters modal is no longer displayed

title: Use location filters (wilaya and moughataa) to update results
description: Verifies selecting a region and sub-region and submitting updates listing results.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Select a wilaya from the wilaya dropdown
Select a moughataa from the moughataa dropdown
Submit the search filters
Verify the listing results update to reflect the selected location filters

title: View annonce details including carousel, description, map and contact section
description: Verifies the detail page exposes the main information blocks for an annonce.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Click an annonce card
Verify an image carousel or gallery is displayed along with title, description, and price
Verify a location map and seller contact information are displayed

title: Navigate back to listing from annonce detail page
description: Verifies the user can return from an annonce detail view to the listing experience via UI navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Click an annonce card
Click the control to return to the listing
Verify the home listing page is displayed with annonce results

title: Login with valid phone and password redirects to home
description: Verifies a user can log in using phone number and password and is redirected to the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home page

title: Login with invalid credentials shows an error
description: Verifies submitting incorrect login credentials shows an invalid-credentials error without logging in.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill an invalid phone number into the phone number field
Fill an invalid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Login validation blocks empty submit
description: Verifies the login form shows validation errors when submitted with required fields empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Submit the login form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Login blocks invalid phone format
description: Verifies the login form validates the phone field when an invalid format is entered.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill an invalid phone format into the phone number field
Fill any password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify a phone number validation error is visible

title: Registration submits with required fields and redirects to OTP page
description: Verifies a user can submit phone-based registration and is redirected to the OTP verification page.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/register
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected to the OTP verification page

title: Registration can optionally mark user as samsar (broker)
description: Verifies the samsar checkbox can be selected and registration still proceeds to OTP verification.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/register
Fill Test Samsar User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Select the samsar option
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected to the OTP verification page

title: Registration shows validation errors for missing required fields
description: Verifies the registration form blocks submission and shows validation errors when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/register
Submit the registration form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: OTP verification page accepts a 4-digit code entry and allows submission
description: Verifies the OTP page allows entering a 4-digit code and submitting the verification form.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/register
Fill Test OTP User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Fill a 4-digit code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification form
Verify the OTP verification submission is processed without client-side validation errors

title: Navigating directly to OTP page redirects away without registration context
description: Verifies direct navigation to the OTP verification page without prior flow context results in redirect away or inability to stay on the OTP page.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/verification/otp
Wait for the page to settle
Verify the user is redirected away from the OTP verification page

title: Forgot Password page loads and accepts phone input
description: Verifies the forgot password page loads its primary form and allows entering a phone number.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Submit the forgot password request
Verify the forgot password page remains usable after submission (no crash or blank state)

title: Forgot Password validation blocks empty submission
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents submitting the forgot password form without a phone number.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Forgot Password validation rejects clearly invalid phone format
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error for an invalid phone value.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password
Fill invalid text into the phone field
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Reset Password page loads and accepts OTP and password inputs
description: Verifies the reset password page loads and allows entering OTP and new passwords.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password
Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid new password into the confirm password field
Submit the reset password form
Verify the reset password page remains usable after submission (no crash or blank state)

title: Reset Password validation blocks empty submission
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents submitting when OTP and passwords are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password
Submit the reset password form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Reset Password rejects mismatched passwords
description: Verifies the form shows an error when new password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password
Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill a different valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the reset password form
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: My Annonces List redirects unauthenticated user to login
description: Verifies protected dashboard route redirects to the login page when not authenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/my/list
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: My Annonces List loads for authenticated user
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access their annonces dashboard and see primary content.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /ar/my/list
Verify the list of personal annonces is displayed

title: Create annonce wizard page loads for authenticated user
description: Verifies the create annonce wizard is accessible after login and primary form content is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to create a new annonce
Verify the create annonce wizard is displayed

title: Publish a new annonce end-to-end (without image upload)
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete the wizard steps and publish an annonce, then see it appear in their listing management page.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to create a new annonce
Select a valid annonce type
Select a valid category
Fill Test Annonce 1001 into the title field
Fill A test description for annonce 1001 into the description field
Fill 12345 into the price field
Select a valid wilaya
Select a valid moughataa
Submit to publish the annonce
Click the link to view my annonces list
Verify Test Annonce 1001 is displayed in the user's annonces list

title: Validation: prevent publishing with required fields missing
description: Verifies the wizard blocks submission and shows validation when required fields are not provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to create a new annonce
Submit to publish the annonce
Verify required field validation errors are displayed

title: Validation: prevent adding more than 8 images
description: Verifies the image limit validation prevents selecting more than the allowed number of images.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to create a new annonce
Select a valid annonce type
Select a valid category
Fill Test Annonce Image Limit into the title field
Fill Testing image limit validation into the description field
Fill 1000 into the price field
Select a valid wilaya
Select a valid moughataa
Attempt to upload 9 images using the file picker
Verify an image limit validation error is displayed

title: Wizard navigation: moving through steps retains entered data
description: Verifies that when the user navigates between steps, previously entered data remains populated.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to create a new annonce
Select a valid annonce type
Select a valid category
Fill Test Annonce Persist 2002 into the title field
Fill Persisted description 2002 into the description field
Fill 2222 into the price field
Click the control to go to the next step
Click the control to go back to the previous step
Verify Test Annonce Persist 2002 is still present in the title field
